prompt: Add an LRU eviction policy to the cache. When the cache exceeds maxSize, evict the least recently used entry. Track access time on both get and set.

turns.content:
<task>
Add an LRU eviction policy to the cache. When the cache exceeds maxSize, evict the least recently used entry. Track access time on both get and set.
</task>

arguments.summary: Read src/cache.ts (20 lines). Basic Map-based cache with maxSize field but no eviction. get/set don't track access order. Need to use Map's insertion-order property: delete and re-insert on access to move to end (most recent), evict from start (least recent).

turns.content:
PASS  tests/cache.test.ts
  Cache
    ✓ stores and retrieves values (1 ms)
    ✓ evicts LRU when full (1 ms)
    ✓ get refreshes access order (1 ms)
    ✓ respects max size (1 ms)

Test Suites: 1 passed, 1 total
Tests:       4 passed, 4 total

arguments.summary: All 4 tests pass. LRU eviction works: get() refreshes access order, set() evicts oldest entry when maxSize exceeded.
arguments.final_answer: Added LRU eviction to src/cache.ts. Uses Map's insertion-order property: get() deletes and re-inserts to move entry to end (most recent). set() checks maxSize after insert and evicts the first Map entry (least recently used). All 4 tests pass.
